variants: Darya Petrov is currently a resident of Franconia Hollow, where her inventive talents continue to thrive. Originally from Sunridge Falls, she is best known for her creation of the Blossom Forge Engine, an invention that has made waves in her community. In recognition of her significant achievements, Darya was honored with the Blazing Seraph Commendation. Beyond her engineering pursuits, she is an active member of the Basilisk Mask Crafters, engaging with others who share her passion for craftsmanship.
